name: Lower and reduce font weight of 'Welcome back' text on login page
goal: Make the 'Welcome back' text appear lower and with a smaller font weight on the login page.
summary: Adjust the 'Welcome back' heading in the login page to have a lighter font weight and be positioned lower (more vertical margin above it).
context_assumptions: Tailwind CSS is used for styling.
The 'Welcome back' text is currently an <h1> with 'text-2xl font-normal mt-3'.
Lowering the text means increasing the top margin (mt-3 to a higher value, e.g., mt-8).
Smaller font weight means using 'font-light' instead of 'font-normal'.

files_to_modify.purpose: Update the 'Welcome back' <h1> to have a lighter font weight and be positioned lower.
files_to_modify.content: Welcome back

constraints: Do not change unrelated styles or structure.
Keep visual consistency with the rest of the UI.
acceptance_criteria: 'Welcome back' text is visually lower (more space above).
'Welcome back' text uses a lighter font weight.
notes: This change is minimal and focused only on the login page's heading.
